zh.lifeSummary: 當Melisende de Rethel於1118年1月8日出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾時，她的父親Gervais Count of Rethel31歲，母親Elisabeth de Namur24歲。她於大約1135年與Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1165年之後在英國英格蘭奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Melisende de Rethel于1118年1月8日出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾时，她的父亲Gervais Count of Rethel31岁，母亲Elisabeth de Namur24岁。她于大约1135年与Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville在英国奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1165年之后在英国英格兰奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rethel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Ithell ‘son of Ithel’, a personal name meaning ‘bountiful lord’. This name was adopted in Wales and elsewhere as a name for a chapel, as it is a homograph of a Biblical placename meaning ‘house of God’ in Hebrew (Genesis 12, 13, 28, and elsewhere in the Bible).
German: habitational name from Bethel in Westphalia.

variants.name: Ethel
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Ithell, Middle Welsh Ithael. See Bethel .

variants.name: Bethea
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Bethel  .
History: The name was brought to VA by John Bethea (known as ‘English John’) (1684– after 1750), who settled in Nansemond, VA.

en.lifeSummary: When Melisende de Rethel was born on 8 January 1118, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Gervais Count of Rethel, was 31 and her mother, Elisabeth de Namur, was 24. She married Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville about 1135, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1165, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Melisende de Rethel est née le 8 janvier 1118, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Gervais Count of Rethel, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Namur, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville environ 1135, à Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1165, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Melisende de Rethel am 8. Januar 1118 in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gervais Count of Rethel 31 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Namur 24. Sie hat um 1135 in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1165 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Melisende de Rethel è nata il il 8 gennaio 1118 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Gervais Count of Rethel, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Namur, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville circa 1135, nel Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1165, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Melisende de Rethelが1118年1月8日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Gervais Count of Rethelは31歳，母Elisabeth de Namurは24歳であった。約1135年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトでRichard Lilbourne Stanton De Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1165年以後にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Melisende de Rethel(이)가 1118년 1월 8일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gervais Count of Rethel(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Namur(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Melisende de Rethel nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1118, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Gervais Count of Rethel, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Namur, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville aproximadamente 1135, em Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1165, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Melisende de Rethel родилась 8 января 1118 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Gervais Count of Rethel было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Namur, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville около 1135 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1165 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Melisende de Rethel nació el 8 de enero de 1118, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Gervais Count of Rethel, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Namur, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville aproximadamente 1135, en Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1165, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
